## Meeting Purpose

[To discuss ongoing projects and address any pending issues between NBD and GrowthX teams.](https://fathom.video/share/GUyM4Qf6soJWy-9Mj6ShyEYjoc9sJTxM?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Meeting disrupted due to Beatriz's personal emergency and poor signal](https://fathom.video/share/GUyM4Qf6soJWy-9Mj6ShyEYjoc9sJTxM?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Indexing issues remain the primary concern for the team](https://fathom.video/share/GUyM4Qf6soJWy-9Mj6ShyEYjoc9sJTxM?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)
  - [Beatriz to work on redesigning index pages upon return](https://fathom.video/share/GUyM4Qf6soJWy-9Mj6ShyEYjoc9sJTxM?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
  - [Communication to continue asynchronously via Slack](https://fathom.video/share/GUyM4Qf6soJWy-9Mj6ShyEYjoc9sJTxM?tab=summary&timestamp=335.0)

## Topics

### Attendance and Technical Issues

  - [Meeting started with only Jenn and Martha present](https://fathom.video/share/GUyM4Qf6soJWy-9Mj6ShyEYjoc9sJTxM?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)
  - [Beatriz joined late due to a personal emergency](https://fathom.video/share/GUyM4Qf6soJWy-9Mj6ShyEYjoc9sJTxM?tab=summary&timestamp=236.0)
  - [Poor signal quality made communication difficult for Beatriz](https://fathom.video/share/GUyM4Qf6soJWy-9Mj6ShyEYjoc9sJTxM?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)

### Project Updates

  - [Indexing issues persist as the main pending task](https://fathom.video/share/GUyM4Qf6soJWy-9Mj6ShyEYjoc9sJTxM?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)
  - [Jenn has been manually requesting indexing (limited to 10 per day)](https://fathom.video/share/GUyM4Qf6soJWy-9Mj6ShyEYjoc9sJTxM?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [Backlog of pages still needs to be addressed](https://fathom.video/share/GUyM4Qf6soJWy-9Mj6ShyEYjoc9sJTxM?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)

### Planned Actions

  - [Beatriz to redesign and resubmit index pages within the next hour](https://fathom.video/share/GUyM4Qf6soJWy-9Mj6ShyEYjoc9sJTxM?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
  - [Team to resubmit pages for indexing](https://fathom.video/share/GUyM4Qf6soJWy-9Mj6ShyEYjoc9sJTxM?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Usman provided Beatriz with pages and a refresh link](https://fathom.video/share/GUyM4Qf6soJWy-9Mj6ShyEYjoc9sJTxM?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)

### Communication Strategy

  - [Jenn to send detailed notes via chat/Slack](https://fathom.video/share/GUyM4Qf6soJWy-9Mj6ShyEYjoc9sJTxM?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
  - [Team agreed to continue discussion asynchronously due to technical difficulties](https://fathom.video/share/GUyM4Qf6soJWy-9Mj6ShyEYjoc9sJTxM?tab=summary&timestamp=266.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Beatriz to redesign and resubmit index pages](https://fathom.video/share/GUyM4Qf6soJWy-9Mj6ShyEYjoc9sJTxM?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)

  - [Team to follow up on indexing progress](https://fathom.video/share/GUyM4Qf6soJWy-9Mj6ShyEYjoc9sJTxM?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)
